title: Wall Street closes lower due to geopolitical tensions and drop in tech stocks
summary: The main US indices retreat slightly amid fears of an escalation in the Middle East and weak semiconductor sector outlook.

title: London Stock Exchange plans to implement 24-hour continuous trading in the coming year
summary: The near-continuous trading project aims to increase the competitiveness of the London market against other global venues.

title: Asian stock markets close sharply higher driven by hope of détente in the Middle East
summary: Asia-Pacific markets bounce back led by the tech sector, with Samsung Electronics gaining 6%.

title: Oil surges to $90 after Iranian attacks on tankers in the Red Sea
summary: The military escalation and the threat of a Houthi blockade send oil prices soaring amid fears of a disruption to global supply.

title: European stock markets trade with doubts amid uncertainty over the Middle East conflict
summary: The German Dax opens unchanged and the Ibex 35 is cautious as investors assess the geopolitical impact.

title: Ibex 35 opens with slight gains and remains around 19,200 points
summary: The Spanish selective trades stable, awaiting the evolution of oil and corporate earnings.

title: Compass Group reports third-quarter organic revenue growth and maintains outlook
summary: Despite the good results, the company's shares fall in the stock market session.

title: Swatch Group posts profit increase in first half and expects strong second half
summary: Shares of the Swiss watchmaker decline despite the positive figures reported.

title: US judge suspends $110 billion Paramount and Warner Bros merger
summary: The deal is halted due to antitrust concerns as regulators examine the agreement.

title: Bitcoin trades around $63,800 in mixed cryptocurrency market
summary: The leading cryptocurrency shows moderate movements as investors weigh the outlook for the second half of 2026.
